name: Alone Against the Flames
description: A classic solo adventure set in the sinister 1920s village of Emberhead, New Hampshire. Players must uncover dark secrets and escape before the annual Beacon festival.

welcome.zh: 欢迎来到克苏鲁的世界。
welcome.en: Welcome to the world of Cthulhu.

no_response.en: The Great Old One did not respond.

death_message.zh: 你的角色已经死亡。请重新开始游戏。
death_message.en: Your character has died. Please restart the game.
